termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
termsOfUse.welcome: Welcome to VirtualMD.app (the "Service", "Site"), operated by MindScript Technologies, LLC ("MindScript", "we", "us", "our"). These Terms of Use ("Terms") govern your access to and use of our website, AI personas, content, and services. By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy, incorporated herein by reference. If you do not agree to these Terms, do not use the Service.

serviceDescription.title: 1. Service Description
serviceDescription.content: VirtualMD.app provides access to advanced AI personas designed to offer health-related information and insights based on medical literature, clinical guidelines, and AI training data. The Service is intended for informational and educational purposes only.
serviceDescription._comment: NEEDS TRANSLATION: Strengthened to emphasize INFORMATIONAL PURPOSES ONLY and consultation with certified healthcare professionals

acceptanceOfTerms.title: 2. Acceptance of Terms
acceptanceOfTerms.content: By registering for, accessing, browsing, or using the Service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms. You represent that you are of legal age to form a binding contract. Your use of the Service constitutes your electronic signature to these Terms.

eligibility.title: 3. Eligibility
eligibility.ageRequirement: To use the VirtualMD.app Service, you must be at least 18 years old or the age of legal majority in your jurisdiction, whichever is greater. If you are using the Service on behalf of an organization, you represent and warrant that you have the authority to bind that organization to these Terms, and you agree to be bound by these Terms on behalf of that organization.
eligibility.legalCapacity: You must also have the legal capacity to enter into these Terms. You may not access or use the Service if you are prohibited from receiving services under applicable law or have previously been suspended or removed from the Service by MindScript.
eligibility.territorialRestrictions: Access to the Service from territories where its content or use is illegal is strictly prohibited. Users are responsible for complying with all local rules, laws, and regulations regarding their use of the Service, including those related to online conduct and acceptable content.

userAccounts.title: 4. User Accounts and Registration
userAccounts.registrationRequirements: You may be required to register and create an account to access certain features of the Service. When registering, you agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information about yourself and to maintain and promptly update your account information.
userAccounts.accountSecurity: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to immediately notify MindScript of any unauthorized use of your account or any other breach of security. MindScript will not be liable for any loss or damage arising from your failure to protect your account information.
userAccounts.accountTermination: MindScript reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or for any other reason at our sole discretion.
userAccounts.singleAccount: Each user may maintain only one account. Creating multiple accounts for a single user is prohibited unless expressly authorized by MindScript.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Intellectual Property Rights
intellectualProperty.ownershipRights: The Service and its entire contents, features, and functionality (including but not limited to all information, software, text, displays, images, video, audio, and the design, selection, and arrangement thereof) are owned by MindScript Technologies, LLC, its licensors, or other providers of such material and are protected by United States and international copyright, trademark, patent, trade secret, and other intellectual property or proprietary rights laws.
intellectualProperty.limitedLicense: Subject to your compliance with these Terms, MindScript grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, non-sublicensable, revocable license to access and use the Service solely for your personal, non-commercial use.
intellectualProperty.prohibitedUses: Except as expressly permitted in these Terms, you may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works of, publicly display, publicly perform, republish, download, store, or transmit any of the material on our Service without the prior written consent of MindScript.
intellectualProperty.userContent: By submitting, posting, or displaying content on or through the Service, you grant MindScript a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, adapt, publish, translate, create derivative works from, distribute, and display such content for the purpose of operating and improving the Service.
intellectualProperty.feedback: Any feedback, comments, or suggestions you may provide regarding the Service is entirely voluntary and we will be free to use such feedback, comments, or suggestions as we see fit without any obligation to you.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable Use Policy
acceptableUse.intro: You agree to use VirtualMD.app only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You agree not to use the Service:

unlawful.title: For any unlawful purpose
unlawful.description: Including violating any applicable federal, state, local, or international law or regulation.

harmMinors.title: To harm or attempt to harm minors
harmMinors.description: Or expose them to inappropriate content.

advertising.title: To transmit, or procure the sending of, any advertising or promotional material
advertising.description: Without our prior written consent, including any 'junk mail', 'chain letter', 'spam', or any other similar solicitation.

impersonate.title: To impersonate or attempt to impersonate MindScript
impersonate.description: A MindScript employee, another user, or any other person or entity.

nefarious.title: For nefarious purposes of any sort
nefarious.description: You explicitly agree not to use the Service to seek information, guidance, or means related to causing harm to yourself or others. This includes, but is not limited to, researching methods of self-harm, violence, illegal activities, or any action that could endanger yourself or another person. Using the platform for such purposes is a violation of these Terms and may result in immediate account termination and reporting to relevant authorities if applicable.

interference.title: In any way that interferes with the proper working of the Service
interference.description: Including introducing viruses, trojan horses, worms, logic bombs, or other material that is malicious or technologically harmful; attempting to gain unauthorized access to, interfere with, damage, or disrupt any parts of the Service, the server on which the Service is stored, or any server, computer, or database connected to the Service.

harmOthers.title: To harm or attempt to harm others
harmOthers.description: Including but not limited to using information from the Service to cause physical, emotional, or psychological harm to any person.

harmAnimals.title: To harm or attempt to harm animals
harmAnimals.description: Including using the Service to obtain information intended to cause suffering, injury, or death to any animal.

asIs.title: 1. Service Provided "AS IS"; INFORMATION ONLY
asIs.content: The information and services provided by VirtualMD.app, including all content generated by AI personas, are provided on an "AS IS" and "AS AVAILABLE" basis for INFORMATIONAL AND EDUCATIONAL PURPOSES ONLY. MindScript makes no representations or warranties of any kind, express or implied, as to the operation of the Service or the information, content, materials, or products included on the Service. You expressly agree that your use of the Service is at your sole risk.
asIs.warning: VirtualMD.app IS ADVICE ONLY. It is NOT a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment from a qualified healthcare provider. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition. Never disregard professional medical advice or delay in seeking it because of something you have read or interacted with on the Service.
asIs.limitations: MindScript does not provide medical diagnosis or treatment. AI-generated content may contain errors or omissions despite our validation processes. Medical advice requires personalized evaluation by licensed healthcare providers. Health information may become outdated. Your unique medical history requires professional evaluation.
asIs.fdaWarning: The Service, its content, and its AI personas are NOT approved by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) or any other regulatory body as a medical device or for diagnostic or treatment purposes.
asIs._comment: NEEDS TRANSLATION: Changed 'advice' to 'information' throughout, emphasized consultation with certified healthcare professionals

noHipaa.title: 2. No HIPAA Compliance for General Use
noHipaa.content: You explicitly acknowledge and agree that VirtualMD.app, in its general consumer-facing service offering, is NOT A HIPAA-COMPLIANT SERVICE for the purposes of use by HIPAA Covered Entities or their Business Associates managing Protected Health Information (PHI) as defined under the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act of 1996 (HIPAA).
noHipaa.details: While MindScript implements strong security measures (detailed in the Privacy Policy section), the platform's architecture, data handling, and operational procedures for the general service do not meet the specific administrative, physical, and technical safeguard requirements mandated by the HIPAA Security Rule for handling PHI by Covered Entities or Business Associates acting on their behalf without a specific Business Associate Agreement (BAA) in place for a dedicated use case.
noHipaa.agreement: By using the Service, you agree that you will NOT use it to store, process, or transmit PHI in a manner that would require HIPAA compliance on the part of MindScript, unless you have entered into a separate, valid BAA with MindScript Technologies, LLC for a specific, agreed-upon purpose. You agree that the applicable data security standard for information you provide is that of reasonable business security practices within the United States, not the specific standards mandated by HIPAA for PHI.

dataSecurity.title: 3. Limitation of Liability Regarding Data Security
dataSecurity.content: MindScript implements commercially reasonable security measures, including encryption and authentication protocols (as detailed in our Privacy Policy), to protect the information you provide to the Service. However, no security system is impenetrable.
dataSecurity.warning: Therefore, by using this Site, you expressly acknowledge and agree that while MindScript will make reasonable efforts to protect your data consistent with standard business practices, WE DO NOT GUARANTEE THE ABSOLUTE SECURITY OF YOUR INFORMATION. You agree that you CANNOT AND WILL NOT SUE OR HOLD MINDSCRIPT TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, ITS AFFILIATES, OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, OR LICENSORS LIABLE for any damages, losses, costs, or expenses arising out of or in connection with any unauthorized access, use, disclosure, alteration, or destruction of your information (including data breaches), provided that MindScript has implemented reasonable security measures. Your use of the Service constitutes your acceptance of this risk.

generalLiability.title: 4. General Limitation of Liability
generalLiability.content:
TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT SHALL MINDSCRIPT TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, ITS AFFILIATES, OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, OR LICENSORS BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR ANY LOSS OF PROFITS OR REVENUES, WHETHER INCURRED DIRECTLY OR INDIRECTLY, OR ANY LOSS OF DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES, RESULTING FROM:

YOUR ACCESS TO OR USE OF OR INABILITY TO ACCESS OR USE THE SERVICE;
ANY CONDUCT OR CONTENT OF ANY THIRD PARTY ON THE SERVICE, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION, ANY DEFAMATORY, OFFENSIVE, OR ILLEGAL CONDUCT OF OTHER USERS OR THIRD PARTIES;
ANY CONTENT OBTAINED FROM THE SERVICE; OR
UNAUTHORIZED ACCESS, USE, OR ALTERATION OF YOUR TRANSMISSIONS OR CONTENT (INCLUDING DATA BREACHES), EVEN IF MINDSCRIPT HAS IMPLEMENTED REASONABLE SECURITY MEASURES AS OUTLINED IN THESE TERMS AND THE PRIVACY POLICY.

TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, MINDSCRIPT DISCLAIMS ALL WARRANTIES, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT.

IN NO EVENT SHALL THE AGGREGATE LIABILITY OF MINDSCRIPT AND ITS AFFILIATES EXCEED THE GREATER OF ONE HUNDRED U.S. DOLLARS (USD $100.00) OR THE AMOUNT YOU PAID MINDSCRIPT, IF ANY, IN THE PAST SIX MONTHS FOR THE SERVICES GIVING RISE TO THE CLAIM.

THE LIMITATIONS OF THIS SUBSECTION SHALL APPLY TO ANY THEORY OF LIABILITY, WHETHER BASED ON WARRANTY, CONTRACT, STATUTE, TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE), OR OTHERWISE, AND WHETHER OR NOT MINDSCRIPT HAS BEEN INFORMED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF ANY SUCH DAMAGE, AND EVEN IF A REMEDY SET FORTH HEREIN IS FOUND TO HAVE FAILED OF ITS ESSENTIAL PURPOSE.

SOME JURISDICTIONS DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OF CERTAIN WARRANTIES OR THE LIMITATION OR EXCLUSION OF LIABILITY FOR INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES. ACCORDINGLY, SOME OF THE ABOVE LIMITATIONS MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.

emergency.title: 5. Emergency Situations
emergency.content: VirtualMD.app CANNOT act on your behalf in an emergency. If the system suggests you call emergency services (e.g., 911, 999, 101, 000) or seek immediate medical attention, you are solely responsible for taking that action. The Service does not dispatch emergency services. Always rely on local emergency services for urgent medical needs.

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how MindScript Technologies, LLC collects, uses, and discloses information about you through our VirtualMD.app website and services. This policy is incorporated into our Terms of Use.

dataPledge.title: 1. Our Data Privacy Pledge
dataPledge.content: At VirtualMD.app, the privacy and security of your personal information are paramount. We are committed to maintaining the confidentiality and integrity of the data you entrust to us. Our platform is designed with robust security measures to protect your information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction.

security.title: Security Efforts:
security.description: We employ industry-standard encryption protocols for data in transit and at rest, alongside multi-layered security architectures including mandatory 2FA.

noPII.title: No External Use of PII:
noPII.description: We do not use your information in any personally identifiable way for external purposes without your explicit consent.

noSale.title: No Sale of Personal Information:
noSale.description: We will never sell your personal information to third parties.

anonymized.title: Anonymized Data for Improvement:
anonymized.description: We use rigorously anonymized and aggregated data (with all PII removed) to enhance the accuracy, efficacy, and safety of our AI models and platform features. This does not allow identification of any individual user.

infoCollection.title: 2. Information We Collect & Other Privacy Details
infoCollection.content: We collect information you provide directly to us, information we collect automatically through your use of the Service, and information from third-party sources.
infoCollection.accountInfo: Account Information: When you register, we collect information such as your name, email address, and phone number (for authentication purposes).
infoCollection.userContent: User Content: We collect the information you provide when using the Service, including text entered into chat interfaces, profile information (like medication lists, if provided), and feedback.
infoCollection.usageInfo: Usage Information: We automatically collect information about your interactions with the Service, such as IP address, browser type, device information, operating system, pages viewed, links clicked, and the dates and times of your visits.
infoCollection.cookies: Cookies and Similar Technologies: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track activity on our Service and hold certain information. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Information
howWeUse.intro: We use the information we collect for various purposes, including to:
purposes: Provide, operate, maintain, and improve the Service.
Process transactions and send related information, including confirmations and invoices (if applicable).
Send technical notices, updates, security alerts, and support and administrative messages.
Respond to your comments, questions, and requests and provide customer service.
Communicate with you about products, services, offers, promotions, rewards, and events offered by MindScript and others.
Monitor and analyze trends, usage, and activities in connection with our Service.
Detect, investigate, and prevent fraudulent transactions and other illegal activities.
Personalize and improve the Service and provide content or features that match user profiles or interests.
Improve the accuracy, efficacy, and safety of our AI models using anonymized data.
Carry out any other purpose described to you at the time the information was collected.

howWeShare.title: How We Share Information
howWeShare.vendors: With Vendors and Service Providers: We may share information with third-party vendors, consultants, and other service providers who need access to such information to carry out work on our behalf.
howWeShare.legal: In Response to Legal Process: We may disclose information if required to do so by law or in the good faith belief that such action is necessary to comply with a legal obligation.
howWeShare.consent: With Your Consent: We may share information with your consent or at your direction.
howWeShare.businessTransfers: Business Transfers: We may share or transfer information in connection with any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition.
howWeShare.aggregated: Aggregated or De-Identified Data: We may share aggregated or de-identified information, which cannot reasonably be used to identify you.

choices.title: Your Privacy Choices
choices.accountInfo: Account Information: You may update, correct, or delete information about you at any time by logging into your account or contacting us.
choices.deletion: Data Deletion: You have tools to permanently delete individual conversations or your entire account.
choices.cookies: Cookies: Most web browsers are set to accept cookies by default. You can usually choose to set your browser to remove or reject browser cookies.
choices.promotional: Promotional Communications: You may opt out of receiving promotional emails from MindScript by following the instructions in those emails.

infoCollection.retention: Data Retention: We store the information we collect about you for as long as is necessary for the purpose(s) for which we originally collected it. We retain account information for as long as your account is active and a reasonable period thereafter.
infoCollection.international: International Data Transfers: MindScript is based in the United States, and we process and store information in the U.S. By using the Service, you consent to the transfer of your information to the U.S.
infoCollection.children: Children's Privacy: The Service is intended for adults and is not directed to children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children.

securityPractices.title: 5. VirtualMD.app's Security Practices
securityPractices.intro: We employ a multi-layered security strategy:

password.title: Password Encryption:
password.description: Passwords are encrypted using industry-standard hashing algorithms.

twoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA):
twoFactor.description: Mandatory for all accounts, requiring verification via a second factor (e.g., code to email/phone).

threeFactor.title: Three-Factor Authentication (3FA) Option:
threeFactor.description: Optional enhanced security requiring password, email code, AND SMS code.

dataEncryption.title: Data Encryption:
dataEncryption.description: Information (including conversations) is encrypted at rest and in transit (TLS/SSL).

deletion.title: Permanent Data Deletion:
deletion.description: You can permanently delete individual conversations or your entire account. Deleted information is irrecoverable from our primary systems.

access.title: Access Controls:
access.description: Access to user database records by personnel is strictly controlled, limited, logged, and governed by internal policies. Routine browsing is prohibited.

securityPractices.conclusion: These measures provide robust account security, but remember no system is 100% secure.

hipaaReiteration.title: 6. VirtualMD.app & HIPAA Considerations (Reiteration)
hipaaReiteration.content: As stated in the Disclaimers, the general VirtualMD.app service is NOT HIPAA compliant for Covered Entity / Business Associate use cases involving PHI without a specific BAA. While we implement strong security, our general service operates under standard business security practices, not the specific requirements of the HIPAA Security Rule for PHI managed by Covered Entities.
hipaaReiteration.warning: Users requiring strict HIPAA compliance for PHI they manage should not use our general platform for such purposes without a BAA. Users must not input information traceable to individual patients in a context violating HIPAA without explicit, informed consent acknowledging the platform's non-HIPAA compliant status for that use.

thirdParty.title: 7. Data Usage by Third-Party AI Engine Providers
thirdParty.intro: MindScript integrates with leading AI model providers (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, Google).

mindscript.title: VirtualMD.app:
mindscript.description: We only use anonymized, aggregated data for internal system improvement.

providers.title: Third-Party AI API Providers:
providers.description: Major providers accessed via API (like OpenAI, Anthropic) typically state in their policies that data submitted via API is NOT used to train their general foundation models. We configure our use of these services to align with these privacy-preserving options. Review their specific policies for details.

changesToTerms.title: Changes to These Terms and Policy
changesToTerms.content: We may revise and update these Terms from time to time in our sole discretion. All changes are effective immediately when we post them, and apply to all access to and use of the Service thereafter.
changesToTerms.notice: Your continued use of the Service following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you.
changesToTerms.materialChanges: If we make material changes to these Terms, we will notify you via email and/or by posting a notice on the Service prior to the change becoming effective.

termination.title: Termination
termination.userTermination: You may terminate your account and cease using the Service at any time by following the instructions within the Service or contacting us.
termination.serviceTermination: MindScript may, in its sole discretion, suspend or terminate your access to all or part of the Service, with or without notice, for any reason, including breach of these Terms.
termination.effectOfTermination: Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease. All provisions of the Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination.
termination.noLiability: We shall not be liable to you or any third party for any termination of your access to the Service.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
governingLaw.governingLaw: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of law principles.
governingLaw.jurisdiction: You agree to submit to the personal and exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located within New Castle County, Delaware.
governingLaw.arbitration: Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms or the Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration in accordance with the Commercial Arbitration Rules of the American Arbitration Association.
governingLaw.classAction: You agree that any dispute resolution proceedings will be conducted only on an individual basis and not in a class, consolidated, or representative action.
governingLaw._comment: NEEDS TRANSLATION: Updated to Delaware law with Massachusetts jurisdiction

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms or the Privacy Policy, please contact us at: <emailLink>legal@virtualmd.app</emailLink> or via our Contact Us page.

miscellaneous.title: Miscellaneous
miscellaneous.entireAgreement: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and MindScript regarding the use of the Service.
miscellaneous.severability: If any provision of these Terms is held to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.
miscellaneous.waiver: The failure of MindScript to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be deemed a waiver of such right or provision.
miscellaneous.assignment: You may not assign or transfer these Terms, by operation of law or otherwise, without MindScript's prior written consent.
